fields.value: Ensuring consistent accuracy and control over AI agent responses
Building a strong knowledge foundation without starting from scratch
Limited availability of engineering resources for integration
Managing maintenance, updates, FAQs, and new product launches without dedicating an entire team
superior accuracy, faster deployment, and lower operating costs compared to general-purpose models

evidence.quote: A key reason enterprises hesitate to roll out AI agents is the difficulty in ensuring consistent accuracy and control over responses.
"We've spent decades building our knowledge base—do we need to start from scratch?" This is a common concern for enterprises considering AI agents.
Another challenge lies in the limited availability of engineering resources for integration.
Enterprises worry about how to manage updates, FAQs, and new product launches without dedicating an entire team to the task.
At Eloquent AI, we employ robust strategies to achieve full control of AI agent responses and enhance their accuracy
drawing from real-world deployments in regulated industries.
Eloquent AI offers plug-and-play capabilities that work with CRMs, payment systems, and stock records

Eloquent AI's domain-specific models, such as Oratio Fin for financial services and Oratio Life for the consumer sector, provide superior accuracy, faster deployment, and lower operating costs compared to general-purpose models.
